calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Elaine Ercolini appearing for and with executor. Counsel informed the Court that the objections filed have been withdrawn. The objector wants to reduce Ms. Ross's fees by $1,500.00. Court agrees. Order signed as modified.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
